commands.review_summary:
The PR changes host post-update plugin sync so trusted catalog-backed official npm and ClawHub install records are updated from catalog/channel specs, including disabled or exact-pinned records, with regression tests and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. Current main skips disabled install records before update/repair and preserves exact stored specs, which models the stale official npm/ClawHub install path without mutating the checkout.
